name: misp-add-object

outputs.description: MISP event ID. MISP.Event.Object.MetaCategory Object meta category.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ID

outputs.description: Distribution of the object. MISP.Event.Object.Name Name of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Distribution

outputs.description: Template version of the object. MISP.Event.Object.EventID ID of the event in which the object was first created.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.TemplateVersion

outputs.description: UUID of the template. MISP.Event.Object.Timestamp Timestamp when the object was created.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.TemplateUUID

outputs.description: Whether the object was deleted. MISP.Event.Object.ID ID of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Deleted

outputs.description: UUID of the object. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Value Value of the attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.UUID

outputs.description: ID of the first event from which the object originated. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Timestamp Date
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.EventID

outputs.description: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Deleted Whether the object was deleted? MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ObjectID
outputs.name: Timestamp when the object was created.

outputs.description: ID of the object. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.DisableCorrelation Whether correlation is disabled.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: ID of the attribute. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ObjectRelation Relation of the object.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ID

outputs.description: Object type. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.UUID UUID of the attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Type

outputs.description: Whether the to_ids flag is on. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Category Category of the attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.ToIDs

outputs.description: ID of the sharing group. MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.Comment Comment of the attribute.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Object.Attribute.SharingGroupID
